panels.description: Ratio of requested data that already exists in the cache. It is the ratio of the amount of data that already exists in the cache to the total amount of requested data. A higher cache hit ratio means higher cache usage of the system, fewer times that data needs to be read from the disk or network, and faster system response speed.
panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio

panels.description: Ratio of the extra memory space used by the sorting algorithm to the memory space occupied by the sorted data. In a merge sort, for example, the size of the merge buffer is often proportional to the size of the sorted data, so the in-memory ratio is usually between 10% and 50%.
panels.title: In-memory Sort Ratio

panels.description: Total number of database file reads
panels.title: File Reads

panels.description: Total number of database file writes
panels.title: File Writes

panels.description: Number of database file reads per second
panels.title: File Reads per Second

panels.description: Number of database file writes per second
panels.title: File Writes per Second

panels.description: Total data volume of the database
panels.title: Data Volume

panels.description: Number of active SQLs in the database
panels.title: Active SQL Count

panels.description: Number of sessions that access the database
panels.title: Session Count

panels.description: CPU usage of each node in the cluster
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description:
Memory usage of each node in a cluster, in percentage



**Note:**

After the console is upgraded to 8.3.0.202, the memory usage includes the memory occupied by the cache. Therefore, the value of this metric increases compared with that before the upgrade.
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Number of I/O requests processed by each node in the cluster per second
panels.title: IOPS

panels.description: Data input to each node in the cluster per second over the network
panels.title: Network Input Throughput

panels.description: Data sent to the network per second from each node in the cluster
panels.title: Network Output Throughput

panels.description: Disk usage of each node in the cluster
panels.title: Disk Usage

panels.description: Total disk space of each node in the cluster
panels.title: Total Disk Size

panels.description: Used disk space of each node in the cluster
panels.title: Used Disk Space

panels.description: Data volume read from each disk in the cluster per second
panels.title: Disk Read Throughput

panels.description: Data volume written to each disk in the cluster per second
panels.title: Disk Write Throughput

panels.description: Average time used each time when a disk reads data
panels.title: Average Time per Disk Read

panels.description: Average time used each time when data is written to a disk
panels.title: Average Time per Disk Write

panels.description: Average I/O queue length of a disk
panels.title: Average Disk Queue Length

panels.description: Average disk I/O usage of DNs in a cluster
panels.title: DN I/O usage

list.description: Datasource where the OTC Prometheus Exporter data is stored
list.label: Datasource
list.name: datasource
